examples: Portfolio stable. JasperOS Executive Cockpit foundation operational.

The portfolio remains strategically aligned. External dependencies continue to constrain Vinyiabtumayokan and Earth Bridge Alliance execution. Today's focus was advancing JasperOS from a dashboard implementation into a structured executive interface using ExecutiveStateProtocol v3.0 as the canonical contract. The separation between JasperOS as the executive layer and CompanyOS as the broader operating system was clarified and reinforced. The Executive Cockpit foundation is now validated through schema alignment, dashboard integration, navigation improvements, and executive workflow definition.
Continue JasperOS implementation by completing executive interface components while preserving ExecutiveStateProtocol v3.0 as the immutable canonical contract.
